# zendesk_group_membership (Resource)

Manages a Zendesk group membership. Group memberships are immutable — changing user_id or group_id forces recreation.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_id` (Number) The ID of the group.
- `user_id` (Number) The ID of the user (agent).

### Optional

- `default` (Boolean) If true, tickets assigned directly to the agent will assume this membership's group.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `updated_at` (String)
